## Atlas Submission

**Atlas name:** `atlases/___`

### Checklist

- [ ] `atlas.json` has `name`, `version`, `semver`, `description`, `author`, and `entries`
- [ ] `atlas.json` `name` matches the directory name
- [ ] `thumbnail.png` is included (256x256 recommended)
- [ ] All images are PNG, JPG, or WebP and under 2 MB each
- [ ] Total atlas size is under 20 MB
- [ ] I have the rights to share all included images
- [ ] I did **not** modify `index.json` (it's auto-generated on merge)
- [ ] I agree to release this atlas under [CC BY-SA 4.0](LICENSE)
- [ ] If derived from another atlas, I included an `"origin"` field in `atlas.json`
